name: Carrot, Orange & Radish Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, cut into bite-sized chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shredded carrots, diced onions, sliced radishes, and chopped cilantro in a salad bowl.
2. Whisk together olive oil, orange juice, orange-blossom water, cinnamon, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients and toss to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve garnished with pita wedges.
